name: plan-plus
description: Optimizes Claude Code plan mode: on ExitPlanMode the full plan is copied to a plan-docs folder (plan-full.md) alongside a reference-docs/ folder, and the on-disk plan file is rewritten as a compressed line-reference index (each `## ` / `### ` header annotated with its (N-M) line range in the copy). Includes a reused-session executor agent so steps share one ephemeral agent context instead of spawning a new one per step.
